category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a sound system for POSIX OSes; official freedesktop PulseAudio page describes the PulseAudio software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage uses the PulseAudio project name; official freedesktop page is titled PulseAudio.
docs_sources: Official freedesktop PulseAudio wiki provides the documentation section.
repo_sources: Official freedesktop PulseAudio download page says current development sources are managed with Git on freedesktop.org; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a POSIX sound system; source_facts.executables lists PulseAudio command-line tools.
